content.text:
Remove the stale lock file first:

```
rm /Users/shunkakinoki/dotfiles/.git/index.lock
```

Then retry:

```
git restore --staged bun.lock
```

file.content:
[package]
name = "dotfiles"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[dependencies]
git-ai = { git = "https://github.com/git-ai-project/git-ai", branch = "main" }
rtk = { git = "https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk", branch = "master" }
worktrunk = "0.29.4"

content.text:
Update the version in `Cargo.toml`. First check the latest version:

```
cargo search worktrunk --limit 1
```

Then update line 12 in `Cargo.toml` to the new version and run `cargo update -p worktrunk`.

Or simply run:

```
cargo update -p worktrunk
```

This will update `Cargo.lock` to the latest compatible version. If it's a major bump, you'll need to manually change the version string in `Cargo.toml` too.

content.text: `.bzr/` is the metadata directory for **Bazaar** (bzr), a distributed version control system developed by Canonical (the company behind Ubuntu). It was popular in the mid-2000s, especially in the Ubuntu/Launchpad ecosystem, but is largely defunct now — most projects migrated to Git.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
worktree-path = "{{ repo_path }}/.worktrees/{{ branch | sanitize }}"

[post-start]
copy = "wt step copy-ignored"

[step.copy-ignored]
exclude = [".bzr/", ".conductor/", ".entire/", ".hg/", ".jj/", ".pi/", ".pijul/", ".sl/", ".svn/", ".worktrees/"]

[commit]
stage = "all"

[commit.generation]
command = "MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=0 claude -p --model=haiku --tools='' --disable-slash-commands --setting-sources='' --system-prompt=''"

[list]
summary = true

[merge]
squash = true
commit = true
rebase = true
remove = true
verify = true

content.text: Done. The built-in VCS dirs are already excluded by default, so the custom list only needs your additional ones.
